title: Smoke-Cold Shredded Venezuelan Yuca Paquete
description: A comforting, mustardy Venezuelan dish featuring dried oregano, smoked yuca, and dairy-free-friendly ingredients.
instructions: Peel and chop the yuca into large chunks.
Place the yuca chunks in a bamboo steamer over boiling water and steam for 20 minutes.
Once the yuca is tender, remove it from the steamer and let it cool.
Mash the yuca in a large bowl using a fork or potato masher.
Add the smoked paprika, dried oregano, garlic, mustard seeds, salt, and black pepper to the bowl with the mashed yuca.
Heat the neutral oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the yuca mixture to the pan and cook, stirring frequently, for 10-12 minutes.
Remove the pan from the heat and let the yuca mixture cool to room temperature.
Cover the pan with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 4 hours or overnight.
Once the yuca mixture has chilled, use a spatula to break it up into shreds.
Serve the smoke-cold yuca paquete chilled or at room temperature.
